channel.title: pre-install on László Szurok
channel.description: Recent content in pre-install on László Szurok

item.title: Pre-Installation
item.description: Connecting to the internet I have a wireless card in my laptop, but it is not working in a live enviroment due to driver problems. I am going to fix it after the installation. For now I’m going to use my phone to share its wifi connection with the machine through usb. For this to work we need to start a program called dhcpcd. ❯ dhcpcd Now you can plug in your phone and share its internet connection with the laptop.
